# Codex Dream Skin Source Notice

This directory contains an adapted asset from:

- Repository: https://github.com/Fei-Away/Codex-Dream-Skin
- Commit: `26c6c410e0e0bfc053356474620e17f934f483fc`
- Asset: `macos/assets/portal-hero.png`
- SHA-256: `31bde93bb02d6723e0b6aa0ead675577604120acb0a6799163dd37f5cdd0a08e`

The bundled image is the upstream project's original abstract demo artwork.
The upstream software and demo artwork are distributed under the MIT license
included in `LICENSE`.

This Web adaptation only uses the visual asset and theme colors. It does not
run the upstream CDP injector or modify the official Codex desktop app.

Codex Dream Skin is an unofficial customization project and is not affiliated
with, endorsed by, or sponsored by OpenAI.
